mapper.select:
select count(*) from natural_disaster nd
nd.longitude is not null and nd.latitude is not null
and nd.country like '%' || #{country} || '%'
and nd.location like '%' || #{place} || '%'
and nd.disaster_type like '%' || #{type} || '%'
and (nd.start_year || '-' || LPAD(nd.start_month::text, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(nd.start_day::text, 2, '0') || ' 00:00:00')::timestamp >= #{begin_date}
and (nd.start_year || '-' || LPAD(nd.start_month::text, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(nd.start_day::text, 2, '0') || ' 23:59:59')::timestamp <= #{end_date}
select distinct disaster_type as disasterType from natural_disaster
